name: Kevel Audience (Actions)
description: Sync Segment user profile traits and Engage Audiences to Kevel Audiences. Only users with a Segment userId will be synced.

audienceDomain.label: Kevel Audience Domain
audienceDomain.description: Your Kevel Audience root subdomain. For example: "cdp.yourdomain.com".

userIdType.label: Kevel Audience User ID Type
userIdType.description: Kevel Audience User ID Type to map your Segment User ID to. For example: "crm".

clientId.label: Kevel Audience client ID
clientId.description: The Kevel Audience client ID to identify the event. For example: "brand-name".

siteId.label: Kevel Audience site ID
siteId.description: The Kevel Audience site ID to identify the event. For example: "segment-app".

apiKey.label: Kevel Audience API Key
apiKey.description: The Kevel Audience API Key to authorize the requests. Get yours from your Kevel Customer Success representative.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Kevel Audience. For example: "segmentSync".

syncKevelAudience.title: Sync Kevel Audience
syncKevelAudience.description: Sync Segment user profile traits and Engage Audiences to Kevel Audiences. Only users with a Segment userId will be synced.

traits_or_props.label: Traits or properties object
traits_or_props.description: A computed object for track and identify events. This field should not need to be edited.
